arts.ttl: Unai Emery reveals what he really thinks of Youri Tielemans as Aston Villa ace set for Man City landmark
arts.sum: Unai Emery reveals what he really thinks of Youri Tielemans as Aston Villa ace set for Man City landmark "Some players are joining us this year and they are not playing in the starting XI and they need time," he explained.

arts.ttl: Why Pep Guardiola is right to say a top five Premier League finish would be a success for Manchester City, writes JACK GAUGHAN
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: City boss Guardiola might have deleted WhatsApp and claimed to have no social media on his phone but that hasn't always been the case in his time at the club.

arts.ttl: Sverre Nypan: Arsenal snub exposes specific Gunners transfer failing amid Aston Villa 'progress'
arts.sum: Arsenal journalist Charles Watts explains why he is not "losing sleep" over the Gunners missing out on the signature of talented Rosenborg midfielder Sverre Nypan.

arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester City vs. Aston Villa injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Premier League clash between Manchester City and Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola admits he’s been ‘unfair’ with Man City star
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola admitted he has been “unfair” with Man City winger Jeremy Doku in recent weeks. The Belgian winger has been restricted to substitute appearances in each of the Premier League champion’s last three games against Manchester United, Crystal Palace and Everton. Man City did manage to stretch the Toffees more when Doku came on […] The post Pep Guardiola admits he’s been ‘unfair’ with Man City star first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Man City battle for wonderkid 'comparable to Messi'
arts.sum: Lyon star Rayan Cherki has 'a talent comparable to Lionel Messi' and could become as good as Mesut Ozil, according to the club's long-time former president Jean-Michel Aulas and current captain Alexandre Lacazette. In fact, according to former Lyon president Jean-Michel Aulas and current captain Alexandre Lacazette, the youngster could become one of the world's best.

arts.ttl: Man Utd & Man City-linked Tyler Dibling responds to £100m price tag rumours
arts.sum: Tyler Dibling's been linked to Manchester United and a number of other big clubs - but Southampton's rumoured asking price is steep to say the least.

arts.ttl: Man City predicted lineup vs Aston Villa - Premier League

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola fires strong warning to Man City ahead of Aston Villa clash
